caption: A man with short, thinning brown hair and a fair complexion stands behind a podium in a professional setting against a plain, light-colored wall. He is dressed in a dark navy blue blazer over a dark button-down shirt. A thin microphone stands to his right, and a clear plastic water bottle is positioned on the podium in front of him. At the top of the scene, a logo and text reading "mediasite by cornerstone" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, his expression focused and serious. He begins with his arms mostly still at his sides, then raises his left hand to gesture emphatically, opening his palm outward. He then brings his hands closer together, using both to gesture as he continues to speak, shifting his weight slightly while maintaining his position behind the podium.
